data.title: TagFilter pills: full house-accent border on hover (match DocumentCard; drop /40)

data.body: Follow-up to FRAC-216 (user approved). The Lab-page tag-filter pills (src/components/lab/TagFilter.tsx:55) hover an inactive pill's border to hover:border-[#C44878]/40 — same /40 ghost-softening we just removed from DocumentCard. Change to hover:[border-color:var(--accent,currentColor)] for full house-accent on hover (emphasis tier), keeping hover:text-foreground. TagFilter renders within LabPage's --accent scope (=house-publications-deep #C44878), so color is unchanged; only opacity 40%->100%. Bonus: removes a raw grandfathered hex from a className. Resting border stays var(--foreground-faint) (structural, inline style). OUT OF SCOPE: the focus ring focus:ring-[#C44878]/40 (a focus STATE — leave it) and the active-pill inline LAB_DEEP styles. Acceptance: typecheck/build/conformance pass; tests at FRAC-199 baseline (7), no new.

REVIEW (cold) — PASS. Diff is the single intended line in TagFilter.tsx:55: inactive-pill hover `hover:border-[#C44878]/40 hover:text-foreground` → `hover:[border-color:var(--accent,currentColor)] hover:text-foreground`. Verified: active branch `hover:opacity-90` unchanged; focus ring `focus:ring-[#C44878]/40` (line 53) unchanged (out-of-scope focus state); inline LAB_DEEP active styles + resting `var(--foreground-faint)` border unchanged. No raw #C44878 remains in className except the intentional focus ring. Accent resolution: LabPage `<main>` sets --accent: var(--color-house-publications-deep) = #C44878 (index.css:30), inherited LabPage→ArchiveToolbar→TagFilter, so the hover border resolves to publications pink, NOT the currentColor fallback. Correct. OBSERVABILITY FLAG: the only production render of ArchiveToolbar (LabPage.tsx:79) passes showTags={false}, so TagFilter does not currently render anywhere in the app — the change is correct but not observable in the live UI until tags are enabled. Tests: typecheck PASS, build PASS, conformance PASS (no net-new off-vocabulary colors; one grandfathered hex removed), pnpm test 148 passed / 7 failed — exactly the FRAC-199 baseline (buttons x2, footer x2, navigation x1, neighborhood x2), zero new failures, none touch TagFilter (no TagFilter test exists). Meets all acceptance criteria.
